# CWE-182 negative: reject unknown roles instead of collapsing
lang: go
file: CWE-182-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-182 Collapse of Data into Unsafe Value (mitigated)
func AssignRole(c *gin.Context, roles map[string]bool) {
	role := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(c.PostForm("role")))
	if !roles[role] {
		c.JSON(http.StatusForbidden, gin.H{"error": "denied"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"role": role})
}
